title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Licious - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Licious - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Licious! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Licious:
Licious is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Licious!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
